calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-07-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: CAL-STEAM Supply, Inc., a Corp., aka CAL STEAM Santa Rosa.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: The Scott Companies, Inc., a Corp; Scott Co. of California, a Corp; Scott-Norman Mechanical, Inc., a Corp; Scott-Norman a Joint Venture; WTE, Inc., a Corp; Scott Mechanical International, Inc., a Corp; as follows:
Principal $491,881.19
Interest $108,172.87
Attorney's Fees $6,808.81
Costs $725.00 for a total of $607,587.87
Judgment signed in open court.
